purpose: In-repo probe/fixture ledger. Rows with a numeric status record safe read operations captured against a confirmed sandbox workspace; fixture-only rows record committed redacted golden fixtures that can be refreshed by scripts/probe-and-stamp.mjs (read-only, creds-optional) once sandbox credentials are confirmed. This replaces sole reliance on sibling-repo notes and can feed a future GOCLMCP live-status stamp bump.

rows.note: Read-only project list fixture; refresh through scripts/probe-and-stamp.mjs projects.list only after confirming sandbox credentials.
Golden fixture for tax/discount x100 GET scale; unit-pinned in wrapper/tests/wire-shape.test.ts.

Search-as-read fixture; envelope {count,requests}; statuses filter 400s on WITHDRAWN (guarded in mcp/src/tools/timeOff.ts). Refresh through scripts/probe-and-stamp.mjs timeoff.requests.search only after confirming sandbox credentials.
Not re-probed live in-repo because it is a write op; unitPrice minor*100 scale is unit-pinned and boundary-guarded.
